lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚੇਤਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har cheteh tin balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who remember the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਤਿਨ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad tin mel milaau |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I unite in Union with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਲਾਈ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਬਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tin kee dhoor laaee mukh masatak satasangat beh gun gaaeidaa |2|
lines.english: I touch the dust of their feet to my face and forehead; sitting in the Society of the Saints, I sing His Glorious Praises. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾ ਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: har ke gun gaavaa je har prabh bhaavaa |
lines.english: I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, as I am pleasing to the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: antar har naam sabad suhaavaa |
lines.english: With the Lord's Name deep within my inner being, I am adorned with the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਜਿ ਅੰਤਰੁ ਭਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: so jan saachaa ji antar bhaale |
lines.english: That humble being, who searches within himself,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਚਹੁ ਕੁੰਡੀ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gurabaanee chahu kunddee suneeai saachai naam samaaeidaa |3|
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Bani is heard throughout the four corners of the world; through it, we merge in the True Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad har nadar nihaale |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, sees the Lord with his eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਨਦਰੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: giaan anjan paae gurasabadee nadaree nadar milaaeidaa |4|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Shabad, he applies the ointment of spiritual wisdom to his eyes; the Gracious Lord, in His Grace, unites him with Himself. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਸ ਜਨਮਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maanas janam sabad chit laaeaa |
lines.english: in this human life, I have focused my consciousness on the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਸਭੁ ਅੰਧ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਿਸਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai sabh andh andheraa guramukh kiseh bujhaaeidaa |5|
lines.english: Without the Shabad, everything is enveloped in utter darkness; only the Gurmukh understands. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਇਹੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vaddai bhaag ihu sareer paaeaa |
lines.english: By great good fortune, I obtained this body;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਲਾਗੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh laage doojai bhaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are attached to the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਕਿਤੁ ਆਏ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eik kit aae janam gavaae |
lines.english: Some merely waste away their lives - why have they even come into the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਵੇਲਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਹਾਥਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਪਗਿ ਖਿਸਿਐ ਪਛੁਤਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: eeh velaa fir haath na aavai pag khisiai pachhutaaeidaa |6|
lines.english: This opportunity shall not into their hands again; their foot slips, and they come to regret and repent. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰੁ ਸਰੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad pavitru sareeraa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the body is sanctified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਵੇਖੈ ਸਭ ਥਾਈ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sacho sach vekhai sabh thaaee sach sun man vasaaeidaa |7|
lines.english: One who sees the Truest of the True everywhere, hears the Truth, and enshrines it within his mind. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਗਣਤ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai ganat gur sabad nivaare |
lines.english: Egotism and mental calculations are relieved through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਚੁ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich vasai sach gunee gaheeraa |
lines.english: The True Lord, the ocean of virtue, dwells within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਖਹੁ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo hiradai rakhahu ur dhaare |
lines.english: Keep the Dear Lord close, and enshrine Him in your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sadaa saalaahe mil saache sukh paaeidaa |8|
lines.english: One who praises the Lord forever, through the Guru's Shabad, meets with the True Lord, and finds peace. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਚੇਤੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਚੇਤਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: so chete jis aap chetaae |
lines.english: He alone remembers the Lord, whom the Lord inspires to remember.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad vasai man aae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਆਪੇ ਬੂਝੈ ਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: aape vekhai aape boojhai aapai aap samaaeidaa |9|
lines.english: He Himself sees, and He Himself understands; He merges all into Himself. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਮਨ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਥੁ ਪਾਈ ਸੋਈ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin man vich vath paaee soee jaanai |
lines.english: He alone knows, who has placed the object within his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabade aap pachhaanai |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he comes to understand himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: aap pachhaanai soee jan niramal baanee sabad sunaaeidaa |10|
lines.english: That humble being who understands himself is immaculate. He proclaims the Guru's Bani, and the Word of the Shabad. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਕਾਇਆ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਸਰੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eeh kaaeaa pavit hai sareer |
lines.english: This body is sanctified and purified;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਚੇਤੈ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee chetai gunee gaheer |
lines.english: through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, it contemplates the Lord, the ocean of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਸਭ ਮੂਲੁ ਹੈ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ehu sareer sabh mool hai maaeaa |
lines.english: This body is the source of all Maya;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਗੁਣ ਕਹਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: anadin gun gaavai rang raataa gun keh gunee samaaeidaa |11|
lines.english: One who chants the Glorious Praises of the Lord night and day, and remains attuned to His Love, chants His Glorious Virtues, immersed in the Glorious Lord. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨ ਚੇਤੈ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਚੇਤੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: har na chetai sadaa dukh paae bin har chete dukh paaeidaa |12|
lines.english: It does not remember the Lord, and suffers in eternal pain. Without remembering the Lord, it suffers in pain. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae bharam bhulaaeaa |
lines.english: in love with duality, it is deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: ji satigur seve so paravaan |
lines.english: One who serves the True Guru is approved and respected.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਹੰਸੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa hans niramal dar sachai jaan |
lines.english: His body and soul-swan are immaculate and pure; in the Court of the Lord, he is known to be true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵੇ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ਸੋਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: har seve har man vasaae sohai har gun gaaeidaa |13|
lines.english: He serves the Lord, and enshrines the Lord in his mind; he is exalted, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin bhaagaa gur seviaa na jaae |
lines.english: Without good destiny, no one can serve the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭੂਲੇ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਲਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bhoole mue bilalaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are deluded, and die weeping and wailing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੇਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jin kau nadar hovai gur keree har jeeo aap milaaeidaa |14|
lines.english: Those who are blessed by the Guru's Glance of Grace - the Dear Lord unites them with Himself. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕੋਟੁ ਪਕੇ ਹਟਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kott pake hattanaale |
lines.english: In the body fortress, are the solidly-constructed markets.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਊਤਮ ਪਦਵੀ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam dhiaae din raatee aootam padavee paaeidaa |15|
lines.english: Meditating on the Name of the Lord, day and night, he attains the sublime, exalted status. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਚਾ ਹੈ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape sachaa hai sukhadaataa |
lines.english: The True Lord Himself is the Giver of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲੇਵੈ ਵਸਤੁ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh levai vasat samaale |
lines.english: The Gurmukh purchases the object, and takes care of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kai sabad pachhaataa |
lines.english: Through the Shabad of the Perfect Guru, He is realized.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਕੋ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੭॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam salaahe saachaa poorai bhaag ko paaeidaa |16|7|21|
lines.english: Nanak praises the Naam, the True Name of the Lord; through perfect destiny, He is found. ||16||7||21||
